data.title: Ranger Energy Services, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Houston, Ranger Energy Services, Inc. (NYSE: RNGR) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year concluding on December 31, 2025. Throughout 2025, revenue totaled $546.9 million with a net income of $12.3 million, translating to $0.54 per diluted share. Adjusted EBITDA for the full year amounted to $73.2 million, reflecting an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 13.4%, in contrast to the previous year's $78.9 million and 13.8%.

data.title: Kura Oncology Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
data.description: Kura Oncology disclosed its Q4 financial results on March 5, 2026, at 06:31 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -58.62%, with an EPS of $-0.92 compared to the expected $-0.58. Revenue decreased by $36.55 million from the previous year. In terms of historical earnings, the company also missed on EPS. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Matador Resources Company Announces Expiration and Results of Cash Tender Offer for Any and All of Its Outstanding 6.875% Senior Notes Due 2028
data.description: Matador Resources Company disclosed today the outcome of its cash tender offer to acquire all $500 million outstanding aggregate principal of its 6.875% Senior Notes due 2028. The tender offer closed at 5:00 p.m. on March 4, 2026, with approximately $419,705,000 tendered by the Expiration Time.

data.title: Insights into Ranger Energy Services Q4 Earnings
data.description: Energy company Ranger Energy Services, traded on NYSE under RNGR, released its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 06:34 AM. The report indicated a missed earnings estimate by -33.33%, with an EPS of $0.14 instead of the expected $0.21. Revenue also saw a decline of $900,000 compared to the previous year. For a more detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Liquidia Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 06:30 AM, Liquidia (NASDAQ: LQDA) disclosed its Q4 earnings report. Contrary to expectations, the company fell short on estimated earnings by -54.55%, posting an EPS of $0.15 compared to the anticipated $0.33. This quarter saw a rise in revenue, increasing by $89.10 million from the previous year. Liquidia has a history of outperforming on EPS. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Earnings Summary: Teads Holding Q4
data.description: Teads Holding (NASDAQ: TEAD) released its Q4 earnings report on March 5, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The company exceeded expected earnings by 176.92%, with an EPS of $0.1 compared to an estimated $-0.13. Revenue witnessed a significant increase of $117.65 million compared to the previous year. In the previous quarter, Teads Holding had fallen short in its earnings performance. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: What's Going On With Webull Stock Thursday?
data.description: Shares of Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL) declined in premarket trading following the release of their fourth-quarter earnings report. The digital brokerage platform, which competes with Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) and Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE: SCHW), became publicly traded in April 2025. In the fourth quarter, Webull reported earnings of 4 cents per share, meeting analysts' expectations. The company also disclosed quarterly revenue of $165.2 million. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
